auth.title: Welcome to PulseCheck AI
auth.subtitle: Your AI-powered health companion for accessible healthcare

dashboard.title: Personalized Health Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Tell us about yourself for personalized health insights

vision.title: Vision Scan - Fatigue Analysis
vision.description: Capture or upload a facial photo to analyze fatigue indicators like dark circles, pale skin, and drooping eyelids.

cough.title: Cough Analysis
cough.description: Record a 5-second cough sample for AI classification and recommendations.

skin.title: Skin Scan
skin.description: Capture or upload a photo of the affected skin area for condition identification.

mentalHealth.title: Wellness Screener
mentalHealth.description: Answer a few quick questions based on lifestyle and stress factors for a wellness assessment.
mentalHealth.question: Question {number} of {total}
mentalHealth.urgentSupportDesc: Your responses indicate a high level of stress or emotional burden. Please connect with immediate support resources in your area.

trends.title: Health Trends & Analytics
trends.subtitle: Track health metrics over time for your family
trends.noData: No data available yet. Complete health scans to see trends.

disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: PulseCheck AI provides health information for educational purposes only. Results are AI-generated estimations and are NOT medical diagnoses or prescriptions. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Do not disregard professional medical advice because of information provided by this application.

chat.title: Medu
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm Medu, your PulseCheck AI assistant. How can I help you today?

symptomChecker.title: Symptom Checker
symptomChecker.description: Describe your symptoms and get an AI-powered health assessment with precautions and medicine suggestions.
symptomChecker.enterSymptomsDescription: Describe how you are feeling. Be as detailed as possible for the best results.
symptomChecker.symptomsPlaceholder: e.g. I have a fever since 2 days, headache, sore throat and body aches...

cardioCheck.title: Cardio Wellness Assessor
cardioCheck.description: Assess your cardiovascular wellness using your biometrics and lifestyle data.
cardioCheck.emergencyBanner: 🚨 EMERGENCY: If you are currently experiencing severe, crushing chest pain, sweating, or pain radiating to your left arm/jaw, stop and call emergency services (e.g., 108) immediately.
cardioCheck.step1Desc: Basic bio-metric inputs (Resting HR is optional).
cardioCheck.step2Desc: Tell us about any specific strain or symptoms.
cardioCheck.urgentSupportDesc: Your responses indicate high cardiovascular strain or priority symptoms. Seek professional medical evaluation without delay.
